applicable_situations: Pregnant woman employee being denied maternity leave or maternity benefit
Termination during pregnancy or maternity leave
Denial of nursing breaks or creche facility (for establishments with 50 or more employees)
forum: Inspector appointed under the Act / Labour Commissioner; appeal to the appropriate authority
limitation_period_note: Claim should be made within 1 year of the cause of action; appeal within 60 days of the inspector's order.
procedural_steps: Submit a written claim to the employer for the maternity benefit
On refusal, file complaint with the Inspector under section 17
Inspector orders the employer to pay the due maternity benefit
Appeal to the prescribed authority within 60 days if aggrieved
required_documents: Medical certificate of pregnancy or delivery
Refusal letter or e-mail from the employer (if any)
